title: Hearing Tests for Children: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ilable from: https://www.asha.org/public/hearing/Speech-Testing 
American Speech-Language-Hearing Association (ASHA) [Internet]. Rockville (MD): American Speech-Language-Hearing Association; c1997-2023. Tests of the Middle Ear; [cited 2023 Jan 26]; [about 2 screens]. Available from: https://www.asha.org/public/hearing/Tests-of-the-Middle-Ear 
Cary Audiology Associates [Internet]. Cary (NC): Audiology Design; c2025. Hearing Tests; [cited 2025 Aug 7]; [about 3 screens]. Available from: https://caryaudiology.com/hearing-tests/

Centers for Disease Control and Prevention [Internet]. Atlanta: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; Screening for Hearing Loss; [reviewed 2022 Jul 18; cited 2023 Jan 26]; [about 2 screens]. Available from: https://www.cdc.gov/hearing-loss-children/screening/
